nasb.text: In Your lovingkindness You have led the people whom You have redeemed; In Your strength You have guided them to Your holy habitation.

esv.text: “You have led in your steadfast love the people whom you have redeemed; you have guided them by your strength to your holy abode.

cnv.text: 你憑著慈愛，帶領了你買贖的人民；你憑著能力，引導了他們到你的聖所。

ccb.text: 你以不变的爱引领你所救赎的子民， 以大能带他们进入你的圣所。
